sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this sports game

special_mechanics.name: Friction Toggle
special_mechanics.description: Secret trick: holding A+B on both controllers and pressing Start on team selection screen prevents the puck from being slowed down by friction

special_mechanics.name: Goalie Toggle
special_mechanics.description: Secret trick: holding A+B on both controllers and pressing Start on title screen removes goalies

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Ice Hockey is a sports-paradigm game where detailed movement physics documentation is not typically provided in available sources. Sources contain version history and hidden features but no numerical physics parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ice Hockey (NES, Famicom Disk System)
